name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 claims/month, delayed updates cause client dissatisfaction. We automate claim status tracking instead of manual follow-ups via phone or email.
problem_solved: Lack of timely updates on claim statuses for clients
features: manual entry option for claims not in the system
